name: netsuite
description: Reads selected NetSuite REST Record API resources (customers, vendors, items, sales orders), authenticating with OAuth 1.0a Token-Based Authentication (HMAC-SHA256 request signing). Read-only.

risk.read: external NetSuite REST Record API read of customer, vendor, item, and sales order data
risk.approval: none; read-only, no reverse-ETL write surface

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); the OAuth 1.0a HMAC-SHA256 signature is computed over the live request method/URL/query/timestamp/nonce and conformance's synthetic non-secret config can never populate a real consumer_secret/token_secret, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would fail identically and uninformatively -- hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/hooks/netsuite's own unit tests (the AuthHook's real OAuth1 signing path) and internal/connectors/netsuite's pre-existing legacy parity coverage
